title: ScrollArea Component
content:
## ScrollArea Component This component provides a customizable scrollable container, built on top of `@radix-ui/react-scroll-area`. It allows for enhanced control over the appearance and behavior of scrollbars within your application. ### Purpose The `ScrollArea` component is designed to create visually appealing and functional scrollable areas for content that may exceed the viewport dimensions. It abstracts away the complexities of native scrollbars and provides a consistent UI experience. ### Key Exports * **`ScrollArea`**: The main component for creating a scrollable container. It accepts all props compatible with `ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root`. * **`ScrollBar`**: A sub-component used internally by `ScrollArea` to render the scrollbar itself. It can also be used independently if needed. ### Props **`ScrollArea` Props:** * **`className`**: (string) Optional. Allows for custom styling of the scroll area container. * **`children`**: (ReactNode) The content to be placed within the scrollable area. * `...props`: All other props compatible with `@radix-ui/react-scroll-area`'s `Root` component. **`ScrollBar` Props:** * **`className`**: (string) Optional. Allows for custom styling of the scrollbar. * **`orientation`**: (string, default: `'vertical'`) Specifies the orientation of the scrollbar. Can be `'vertical'` or `'horizontal'`. * `...props`: All other props compatible with `@radix-ui/react-scroll-area`'s `ScrollAreaScrollbar` component. ### Usage Example ```tsx import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area'; function MyComponent() { return (

Tags

{Array.from({ length: 50 }).map((_, i, arr) => (

))}
); } export default MyComponent; ``` This example demonstrates how to wrap content within the `ScrollArea` component. The `div` with `h-[300px] w-[350px] rounded-md border` acts as the container defining the visible scrollable area, and the content inside `ScrollArea` will be scrollable if it exceeds these dimensions.
